tools.name: host_uname
tools.description: Return the kernel name and version of the machine the agent is running on. No arguments. Use when the user asks about the host OS or kernel.

tools.name: host_uptime
tools.description: Return the system uptime and load averages in human-readable form. No arguments.

tools.name: list_processes
tools.description: List running processes whose name matches a regex pattern. Returns one process per line: PID and name.

pattern.description: Regex matched against the process name (e.g. "node", "^postgres").

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show the last N commits of the repository in the current directory (must be a git checkout). Format: short hash, author, ISO date, subject. Note: `count` becomes its own argv element so the placeholder isn't embedded inside a larger string — that's the rule the loader enforces.
